ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT GRADY JEFFERYS, JR.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR FEB-01-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GRADY JEFFERYS, JR.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE HEARING IS CONTINUED TO MAY 16, 2012 TO ENABLE PLAINTIFF TO CONDUCT JURISDICTIONAL DISCOVERY. UNTIL THE MOTION IS HEARD, NO DISCOVERY IS PERMITTED AS TO THE MOVING DEFENDANT OTHER THAN DISCOVERY DESIGNED TO DETERMINE WHETHER THE MOVING DEFENDANT HAS SUFFICIENT CONTACTS WITH CALIFORNIA TO WARRANT PERSONAL JURISDICTION OVER HIM IN THIS STATE. ALL SUCH JURISDICTIONAL DISCOVERY MUST BE COMPLETED BY APRIL 25, 2012. SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION PAPERS, WHICH ARE LIMITED TO WHAT WAS OBTAINED THROUGH THE JURISDICTIONAL DISCOVERY, MUST BE FILED BY MAY 2, 2012. SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY PAPERS MUST BE FILED BY MAY 9, 2012. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Off Calendar

Defendant Grady Jefferys, Jr.'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GRADY JEFFERYS, JR.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT.
No appearances. This matter is off calendar. A dismissal of the entire action was filed March 2, 2012. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Continued To Jun-29-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Grady Jefferys, Jr.'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-01-2012 Continued To May-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GRADY JEFFERYS, JR.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Carol Sleeth of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (438.6681) for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Per plaintiff's request, the hearing is continued to May 16, 2012 to enable plaintiff to conduct jurisdictional discovery. Until the motion is heard, no discovery is permitted as to the moving defendant other than discovery designed to determine whether the moving defendant has sufficient contacts with California to warrant personal jurisdiction over him in this State. All such jurisdictional discovery must be completed by April 25, 2012. Supplemental opposition papers, which are limited to what was obtained through the jurisdictional discovery, must be filed by May 2, 2012. Supplemental reply papers must be filed by May 9, 2012. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Defendant Grady Jefferys, Jr. Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GRADY JEFFERYS, JR.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Elisa R. Sawyer (828.6005) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona; Carol Sleeth of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (438.6681) for defendant and moving party.
Ms. Sawyer provided a courtesy copy of her opposition papers. The court continued the matter to February 1, 2012 at 9:30 am. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GRADY JEFFERYS, JR.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Elisa Sawyer (828.6005) plaintiff and moving party appearing in propria persona; Carol Sleeth of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (438.6681) for defendant and moving party.
Discussed and the court continued the matter to January 27, 2012, for plaintiff to file an opposition and find counsel. Opposition to be filed by January 18, 2012, and a reply by January 23, 2012. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
